description_long: This is a cylindrical, metallic trash bin with a vertically ribbed exterior, giving it a classic urban appearance. The bin is constructed from galvanized steel, exhibiting a weathered, slightly mottled gray finish with visible signs of wear and rust. The top of the bin is open, and a separate, removable flat metal lid with a rectangular handle is placed nearby. Two small, external side-mounted handles are attached near the rim for easy lifting and carrying. The interior is spacious and unlined, suitable for holding general waste. There are no visible labels, symbols, or signage on the surface, making it a generic, utilitarian waste container commonly found on city streets or in parks.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal trash bin with a ribbed exterior, removable flat lid, and side handles. The surface is gray and unmarked, typical of urban waste containers.
description_view_0: The bin is open with the flat lid placed to the right, showing the ribbed metal body and one side handle.
description_view_1: The bin is viewed head-on with the lid placed in front, highlighting the top rim and both side handles.
description_view_2: The bin is open with the lid to the left, showing the ribbed body and a clear view of the interior.
description_view_3: The bin is shown without the lid, focusing on the ribbed exterior and one visible side handle.
attribute_handle_design: external side-mounted handles and a top-mounted handle on the lid
